question: Will Iran sink a US Navy vessel (surface or submarine) before June 1st 2026?
reason: No credible reports confirm Iran sinking a U.S.
evidence: On March 4, 2026, a U.S. Navy submarine sank the Iranian frigate IRIS Dena in the Indian Ocean, resulting in at least 87 Iranian sailors' deaths. ([thedefensepost.com](https://thedefensepost.com/2026/03/05/us-sinks-iran-warship/?utm_source=openai))
As of May 27, 2026, there are no credible reports of Iran sinking a U.S. Navy vessel.
